source: shared fake-transport timeout planning and shared ScriptedCommonFakeTransport prototype
description: Pins deterministic timeout behavior when a fake transport operation has no scripted outcome.

expected.commonDecision: Shared fake transport must report unscripted operations as deterministic timeouts while still recording the attempted command before runtime code delegates to shared.

notes: This vector covers the shared fake-transport missing-script behavior only. Feature-specific timeout durations and public facade timeout/error mapping remain platform compatibility gates.
